title: arrhenatherum sempervirens subsp. setaceum
intro: Arrhenatherum sempervirens subsp. setaceum, commonly known as False Oat-grass, is a perennial plant that belongs to the grass family, Poaceae. The plant is known to have medicinal properties, particularly its essential oil which has been found to have antimicrobial, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Arrhenatherum sempervirens subsp. setaceum include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve respiratory issues, and provide relief from stress and anxiety. The plant is often used in herbal preparations, such as infusions, tinctures, and essential oils, which can be used to promote overall well-being and alleviate various health conditions.
